history.content:
<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells forward and two cells to the right. The cell directly in front of me is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. The cell to my right is a free floor (.), while the cell to my left is a wall (#). To move safely towards the goal, I will first turn right to face the open floor cell.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead (north) is empty floor ('.'), so it is safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, which I can see to the northwest. The path ahead is clear of lava and walls in that direction.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible one cell up and one cell left of my position. Directly in front of me is lava L, so I cannot move forward safely. Turning left will face west, where the cell is a safe floor `.`. From there I can later turn and move north to reach the goal. Turning right would face a wall `#`, so that is not useful.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is at row 6, col 3, facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 5, col 3) is a safe floor (`.`) with lava cells to its left and right. The goal G is visible at row 4, col 4. Moving forward will bring us closer to the goal without entering lava. After this step, we can continue north and then turn right to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is visible two cells ahead and one cell to the right. The cell directly in front is a safe floor (`.`). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal without stepping into lava. After moving forward, I can turn right to face the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly to my right (east). I am facing north, and the cell in front of me is a wall (#). Turning right will face me toward the goal, so I can then move forward to reach it.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me, one step forward. It is safe to move there, as it is not lava. I will move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
